description_long: This is a standard push broom with a long, straight handle and a wide rectangular broom head. The handle is a deep reddish-brown color, likely made of metal or coated wood, and is attached centrally to the broom head. The broom head is dark green and features a dense row of black bristles extending downward, suitable for sweeping large flat surfaces such as sidewalks or garage floors. The bristles are arranged in a straight, uniform pattern, providing effective coverage for debris collection. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The broom appears clean and well-maintained, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A long-handled push broom with a green rectangular head and dense black bristles, designed for sweeping large surfaces. The handle is straight and reddish-brown, attached centrally to the broom head.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the green broom head and the dense black bristles beneath, with the straight handle extending upward.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the broom head and the straight handle, with bristles visible as a thin line below the head.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the broom head and bristles from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the narrow edge of the broom head and the straight handle visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, round cross-section handle made of metal or coated wood, reddish-brown in color, with no visible grip enhancements or end caps.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: Bristles are densely packed, straight, and arranged in a single uniform row along the length of the rectangular broom head, all of similar length and black in color.
attribute_mounting_position: Designed to be stored vertically by leaning against a wall; no visible hole or hook for hanging.
